parsed.explanation: Added missing closing </BIBL> tag to fix nesting for the second book. Replaced unicode escapes with correct characters (e.g. ö, ä, ß, 8vo., †). Updated <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for semantic accuracy. Escaped '&' as '&'. Minor text cleanups for readability while preserving original meaning.
